name: fabricator
description: Fabricator helps create, maintain, publish, and observe reliable Codex plugins and plugin-adjacent projects.

interface.shortDescription: Create, maintain, and publish Codex plugins.
interface.longDescription: Fabricator helps turn plugin ideas, existing Codex plugins, and plugin-adjacent project surfaces into clear, testable workflows. Craft handles local creation and maintenance. Publish handles public release preparation, package evidence, and runtime publication checks. Watch handles post-public usage monitoring and backlog intake.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Fabricator for Codex plugin creation, publishing, monitoring, and runtime updates.
